content_body: Our stay was AMAZING! The house is beautiful, the views were breathtaking, and you truly felt the high end touch and finishes of the home. I am a life coach and chose this property because I wanted my clients to have a combination of the serenity of the mountains, but yet the luxury of a five star hotel. The openness of the cabin created an atmosphere which allowed everyone to feel connected, but yet it provided many pockets of privacy if you just wanted to get away for some alone time, both indoors and outdoors...I would definitely rate this place a TEN, and I will definitely host many more Life Coaching Retreats at this location in the future.
title: AMAZING!
